prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 61.6 kg; Height 158.6 cm; BMI 24.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 174mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 62.9kg; 9 months ago 59.8kg; 6 months ago 64.3kg; 3 months ago 59.8kg; current 61.6kg), Height (12 months ago 158.6cm; 9 months ago 158.6cm; 6 months ago 158.6cm; 3 months ago 158.6cm; current 158.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 12U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 11U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.0mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 8.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 787mg/g; 9 months ago 547mg/g; 6 months ago 533mg/g; 3 months ago 531mg/g; current 762mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 60mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 169mg/dL; 9 months ago 151mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.4g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
